sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22852" key="grith/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γριτή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, dub. sens. in Lib.et Bas.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Epp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.2</biblScope> </bibl> (perh. <sense id="n22852.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">γρύτη</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
